_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement)

title: Department OF Defense (Dod) Interface Standard Documents
summary: This Data Item Description specifies the content and format preparation instructions for Department of Defense interface standards and related documents, ensuring interoperability and compatibility across systems.
use_relationship:
A DoD interface standard will be used to specify the physical or functional interface characteristics of systems, subsystems, equipment, assemblies, components, items or parts to permit interchangeability, interconnection, interoperability, compatibility, or communications.
This Data Item Description contains the content and format preparation instructions for DoD interface standards and their associated documents that are described in the following paragraphs of MIL-STD-962. Only those documents listed below will be required when specified individually on contract.
a. DoD Interface Standard – Paragraphs 4.1 through 5.15.
b. DoD Interface Standard Revision – Paragraph 5.17.
c. DoD Interface Standard Change – Paragraphs 5.18 through 5.18.7.
d. DoD Interface Standard Inactive for New Design Notice – Paragraph 5.19.2.
e. DoD Interface Standard Cancellation Notice – Paragraph 5.19.3.
f. DoD Interface Standard Reinstatement Notice – Paragraph 5.19.4.
g. DoD Interface Standard Reactivation Notice – Paragraph 5.19.5.
h. DoD Interface Standard Administrative Notice – Paragraph 5.19.6.
distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: Reference Documents
preparation_instructions.content: The applicable issue of the documents cited herein, including their approval dates and dates of any applicable notices and revisions, shall be as specified in the contract.

preparation_instructions.title: Format and Content
preparation_instructions.content: Format and content for DoD Interface Standards shall be as follows:

children.title: DoD Interface Standard
children.content: Format and content of DoD Interface Standards shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-962, paragraphs 4.1 through 5.15.

children.title: DoD Interface Standard Revision
children.content: Format and content of DoD Interface Standard Revisions shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-962, paragraph 5.17.

children.title: DoD Interface Standard Changes
children.content: Format and content of DoD Interface Standard Changes shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-962, paragraphs 5.18 through 5.18.7.

children.title: DoD Interface Standard Inactive for New Design Notices
children.content: Format and content of DoD Interface Standard Inactive for New Design Notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-962, paragraph 5.19.2.

children.title: DoD Interface Standard Cancellation Notices
children.content: Format and content of DoD Interface Standard Cancellation Notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-962, paragraph 5.19.3.

children.title: DoD Interface Standard Reinstatement Notices
children.content: Format and content of DoD Interface Standard Reinstatement Notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-962, paragraph 5.19.4.

children.title: DoD Interface Standard Reactivation Notices
children.content: Format and content of DoD Interface Standard Reactivation Notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-962, paragraph 5.19.5.

children.title: DoD Interface Standard Administrative Notices
children.content: Format and content of DoD Interface Standard Administrative Notices shall be in accordance with MIL-STD-962, paragraph 5.19.6.
